SEARCH
Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.model

Interface BotSettings.BotSkinStep

Enclosing class:
BotSettings
public static interface BotSettings.BotSkinStep
Step 2: choose bot skin source.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkin(boolean useOwnerSkin)
    Convenience skin selection.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkin(BotSkin botSkin)
    Sets an explicit skin configuration object.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkinFirstTeamOwner()
    Uses first TEAM_ALLY owner skin source.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkinFromPlayerReference(String playerReference)
    Uses skin from an online player reference.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkinFromTextureUrl(String textureUrl)
    Uses texture URL skin source.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkinFromTextureValue(String textureValue)
    Uses raw texture payload without signature.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkinFromTextureValue(String textureValue, String textureSignature)
    Uses raw texture payload with optional signature.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkinOwner()
    Uses owner skin source.
    BotSettings.FollowStep
    setBotSkinRandom()
    Uses random skin source.

  • Method Details

    • setBotSkin

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkin(BotSkin botSkin)
      Sets an explicit skin configuration object.
      Parameters:
      botSkin - skin configuration
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkin

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkin(boolean useOwnerSkin)
      Convenience skin selection.

      true = owner skin, false = random skin.

      Parameters:
      useOwnerSkin - whether owner skin should be used
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkinRandom

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkinRandom()
      Uses random skin source.
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkinOwner

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkinOwner()
      Uses owner skin source.
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkinFirstTeamOwner

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkinFirstTeamOwner()
      Uses first TEAM_ALLY owner skin source.

      This source is intended for TEAM_ALLY mode.

      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkinFromPlayerReference

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkinFromPlayerReference(String playerReference)
      Uses skin from an online player reference.
      Parameters:
      playerReference - online player name or UUID string
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkinFromTextureValue

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkinFromTextureValue(String textureValue)
      Uses raw texture payload without signature.
      Parameters:
      textureValue - Mojang texture value
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkinFromTextureValue

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkinFromTextureValue(String textureValue, String textureSignature)
      Uses raw texture payload with optional signature.
      Parameters:
      textureValue - Mojang texture value
      textureSignature - Mojang texture signature
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)

    • setBotSkinFromTextureUrl

      BotSettings.FollowStep setBotSkinFromTextureUrl(String textureUrl)
      Uses texture URL skin source.
      Parameters:
      textureUrl - http/https texture URL
      Returns:
      next step (follow default)
